description: The human medical-necessity determination on a contested payer disposition (A2 denied or A4 pended). You open this only after halcyon-pa-disposition-v1 returned A2/A4 — clean A1/A3 auto-adjudications are terminal and never reach here. A clinical reviewer (the performer) assembles the recommendation and basis; the medical director (the principal) renders the binding accept/reject verdict. AGLedger holds the verdict and notarizes it with the director's attribution — it does not render the medical decision. | denialBasis is conditional-required: when the determination upholds a denial, a basis must be supplied (CMS-0057-F specific-denial-reason obligation). | Separation of duties is a deployment requirement: AGLedger records who rendered each verdict, so provision a distinct medical-director key separate from the clinical-reviewer performer that submitted the recommendation, and the reviewer and director stay different identities on the chain. For attribution of the named physician, bind the verdict via AGLedger-On-Behalf-Of against your org IdP.

dispositionRef.description: recordId of the contested halcyon-pa-disposition-v1 (A2/A4) routing this to a human.

systemDisposition.description: The payer-system disposition that triggered human review. A1/A3 do not reach this type.

recommendation.description: The clinical reviewer's recommendation to the medical director. uphold = sustain the denial; overturn/approve = authorize; partial = approve with modification.

determinationBasis.description: Clinical rationale tied to medical-necessity criteria.

criteriaSource.description: The applied criteria set, e.g. 'MCG 26th ed.', 'InterQual', or the plan's medical-policy ref.

denialBasis.description: Specific denial reason required when a denial is upheld (CMS-0057-F).
